title: GENERAL LEGAL AID - 211info
text: LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON KLAMATH FALLS REGIONAL OFFICE GENERAL LEGAL AID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal counseling and representation for individuals who need assistance with routine civil legal matters, usually regarding housing, public benefits, or expungement of criminal records. Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-noon and 1pm-4pm (541) 273-0533 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 273-0533 Toll-free (800) 480-9160 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. If leaving voicemail, leave a very brief message with basic information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-noon and 1pm-4pm Services: Criminal Record Expungement Assistance General Legal Aid If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
